title: ZapHosting Server Integration Menu
description: A ZAP-Hosting Server Integration Menu is a custom in-game or web-based UI that promotes your ZAP-Hosting partner link and discount code. It allows players to easily access hosting services while supporting your partnership.
body:
ZAP-Hosting Server Integration Menu

This mod provides an in-game configurable menu for integrating ZAP-Hosting directly into your Minecraft Modpack. With this, you can easily add your partner link and discount code to promote your ZAP-Hosting affiliation.


This mod is intended for Zap-Hosting Official Partners.
Apply for the Partnership Program.

Mod Installation & Features Guide

Installation Instructions

Step 1: Install the Mod

  • Download the mod .jar file.

  • Place it inside the mods folder of your Modpack.

    • Location: Your_Modpack_Folder/mods/

Step 2: Generate the Configuration File

  • Launch the modpack or directly execute the .jar file.

  • This will automatically generate the necessary config files in the following directory:

    • Config Path: config/zap_hosting_server_integration_menu/common.json5

Step 3: Configure the Mod

  • Modify settings using either:

    • The in-game Config Menu

    • Manually editing the common.json5 file.

Mod Features

1. ZAP-Hosting Integration

  • Players can order a Minecraft server directly by clicking on the ZAP-Hosting image in the game.

  • This provides a seamless way to set up multiplayer worlds with optimized hosting.

2. First-Time In-Game Notification

  • When launching a world for the first time, a special one-time popup message will appear.

  • This message informs players about the ZAP-Hosting integration and how to order a server.

  • The message will only appear once per world to avoid spam.

3. Customizable Settings

  • Players can adjust settings in common.json5 to:

    • Enable/disable the popup message.

    • Customize the ZAP-Hosting image click behavior.
